title: Cobblemon Flying Fix
description: do you like being disconnected in a server while flying welp im sorry but thats not what this does. this mod bassicly just gives slow falling while you join so when you do get disconnected you won't die of fall damage
body: This thing just gives slowfalling dk what you expected tbh but it does fix a problem with how servers dont keep the pokemon and tell if youre riding a pokemon i might add a feature that does that but im not a java coder or a modder so this is what your gonna have to deal with
